Notes: The Red Hawks remain in fourth place in the UCAA with this win over Clarkson.
RPI was led by Kaitlyn Saunders with a game high 21 points and seven rebounds,
while Kristin Kaczynski added 15 points in the win.  Clarkson senior Jen
Martin paced the Golden Knights, scoring 15 points and grabbing four rebounds.
